title: Sunseeker 82
description:
The 2006 Sunseeker 82 Yacht is a 25.15-metre British motor yacht in exceptional condition, powered by twin Caterpillar C32 engines producing 1,675 HP each and reaching a top speed of 32 knots.

She accommodates 8 guests across 4 cabins, including a full-beam master grand suite with private staircase access and a large VIP forward stateroom. Finished in cream upholstery with satin American Walnut and Nero Absolute granite, her interior is both classic and luxurious.

Currently located in Croatia, skipper-maintained and immediately available for sale. Contact Yacht Research for full specifications and survey access.
